# EDT Golden Fixtures

Place frozen golden samples for acceptance and regression here.

Minimum sets:
- AI/semiconductor
- Macro/rates/CPI
- Commodities (oil/gold/gas)
- Geopolitics
- Neutral/noise
- Historical false positives (`金融(LONG)+JPM(None)`)
- Missing opportunity but EXECUTE
- Replay orphan / join failures

Current files:
- `ai_semiconductor_001.json`
- `macro_rates_cpi_001.json`
- `commodities_oil_shock_001.json`
- `geopolitics_strait_001.json`
- `neutral_noise_001.json`
- `false_positive_financial_blackhole_001.json`
- `missing_opportunity_but_execute_001.json`
- `replay_orphan_join_failure_001.json`
- `member_b_mapping_cases_v1_001.json` - `member_b_mapping_cases_v1_018.json`
